name: Newcomer — Part-Year Resident Return with FHSA, Tuition, and OTB
description: Complete Amara Osei-Mensah's 2024 Canadian personal income tax return. Her tax documents are located at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\TaxDocuments\osei_mensah\. Save the completed return as 'amara_osei_mensah.24t' in C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\.

metadata.data_source: CRA Guide T4055 (Newcomers to Canada) 2024; CRA FHSA Guide RC4461
metadata.occupation: Bank manager (RBC — started after arriving in Canada April 1, 2024)
metadata.key_complexity: Part-year resident (arrival April 1); prorated personal credits; FHSA first contribution; T2202 tuition credit; Ontario Trillium Benefit (ON-BEN); world income declaration; spouse with $0 Canadian income
